metadata.description:
The individual is a male-presenting person in their 40s with deep brown skin and a smooth texture, though some fine lines are visible on the forehead and around the eyes. Their face is oval with a defined jawline. Dark brown dreadlocks are pulled back into a bun, revealing a slightly receding hairline. The eyes are a striking light blue, almond-shaped, and set widely apart.

Thick, dark eyebrows have a gentle arch. The nose is broad with a straight bridge and a rounded tip. Lips are medium-full with a well-defined cupid's bow. A neatly trimmed dark beard and mustache cover the chin and upper lip. The person has a warm skin tone with hints of golden undertones. They are looking to the left with a slight smile, head tilted slightly upwards.
metadata.anchor: Light blue eyes with dark skin
